title: dolichos trinervatus
intro: Dolichos trinervatus, also known as the three-veined dolichos, is a plant species belonging to the legume family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Dolichos trinervatus include reducing inflammation, alleviating pain, and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed internally or applied topically as a paste or ointment.
